text:
Comment on attachment 240323
0001-Update-to-3.2.2.patch

>From bd99ef6172e00a0b56ca29bd3c9691105eef691b Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
>From: =?UTF-8?q?Marko=20Cupa=C4=87?= <marko.cupac@mimar.rs>
>Date: Wed, 22 Feb 2023 09:08:24 +0100
>Subject: [PATCH] Update to 3.2.2
>
>---
> www/mathjax3/Makefile | 3 +--
> www/mathjax3/distinfo | 6 +++---
> 2 files changed, 4 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)
>
>diff --git a/www/mathjax3/Makefile b/www/mathjax3/Makefile
>index 0b6fc84fe9e7..ccea25df5488 100644
>--- a/www/mathjax3/Makefile
>+++ b/www/mathjax3/Makefile
>@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
> PORTNAME=	MathJax3
>-DISTVERSION=	3.1.2
>+DISTVERSION=	3.2.2
> CATEGORIES=	www math
> 
> MAINTAINER=	marko.cupac@mimar.rs
>@@ -12,7 +12,6 @@ LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/LICENSE
> USE_GITHUB=	yes
> GH_ACCOUNT=	mathjax
> GH_PROJECT=	MathJax
>-GH_TAGNAME=	c829235
> 
> NO_BUILD=	yes
> NO_ARCH=	yes
>diff --git a/www/mathjax3/distinfo b/www/mathjax3/distinfo
>index c13e02a64136..8dfd7b1b2ea4 100644
>--- a/www/mathjax3/distinfo
>+++ b/www/mathjax3/distinfo

>-TIMESTAMP = 1606216920
>-SHA256 (mathjax-MathJax-3.1.2-c829235_GH0.tar.gz) = dee27f0fbb4b260d7e64b74911b9edcfa7c1ddd0995cc6901e772683283c6f74
>-SIZE (mathjax-MathJax-3.1.2-c829235_GH0.tar.gz) = 4743286
>+TIMESTAMP = 1677052899
